Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Portions Of Stipulation And Proposed Order Under Seal
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BATTERY EAST GROUP D/B/A SCENIC ADVISEMENT, INC.'S Motion To File Portions Of Stipulation And Proposed Order Under Seal.

Plaintiff's unopposed sealing motion is granted. Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and sets forth the findings of CRC 2.550(d) Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
